title: oxalis juruensis
intro: Oxalis juruensis, also known as the Juru wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Oxalis juruensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various medicinal purposes.
